name: /prompt-eval: when prior version eval-history exists, emitted JSON includes regression_from_prior (per §2.10 schema)
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"x","expected":"y"}' > evals/datasets/agents/rsc-reviewer.jsonl && printf '{"version":"2.0.0","eval_pass_rate":0.8,"records":[]}' > prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer/2.0.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" rsc-reviewer --version 2.1.0 && grep -E "\"regression_from_prior\":" prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer/2.1.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
